name: Eggs with Caviar
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the eggs in half and scoop out the yolks into a bowl.
2. Mash together the egg yolks and mayonnaise, season with salt and pepper.
3. Place a heaped teaspoonful of egg yolk mixture back into each egg white.
4. Put a small teaspoonful of caviar over the egg yolk mixture.
5. If desired, use red and black caviar for color contrast.
